videos.title: This commander likes big butts.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a high toughness deck, featuring Plagon, Lord of the Beach as commander in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro 
01:53 - Deck Tech
05:51 - vs Wrenn and Realmbreaker
23:15 - vs Uurg, Spawn of Turg
31:54 - vs Rocco, Street Chef
40:18 - vs Eutropia the Twice-Favored
44:26 - vs Old Stickfingers
48:10 - vs Tinybones, Bauble Burglar
53:55 - vs Yarok, the Desecrated

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/plagon-lord-of-the-beach-brawl
